basic_details.job_title: IBPS Clerk Mains Result 2025-26 OUT (Direct Link) - Download Scorecard @ ibps.in
basic_details.short_information: Quick Summary: Institute of Banking Personnel Selection (IBPS) has released IBPS Clerk Mains Result 2025-26 on 2nd March 2026 at official portal ibps.in. Candidates can check their result and download scorecard using Registration Number/Roll Number & Password/DOB. Check qualifying status, provisional allotment, and next steps below.

important_instructions: ✓ Download and save your scorecard immediately ✓ Take 3-4 printouts for future reference ✓ Check for Language Proficiency Test (LPT) requirements ✓ Keep documents ready for joining formalities ✓ Verify personal details - report discrepancies to IBPS ✓ Monitor official website and registered email/SMS for allotment updates ✓ Prepare for joining in allotted bank
